  • Method Details

    • getDefault

      public static IndexManager getDefault()
      Returns the singleton instance of the IndexManager.
      Returns:
      the singleton instance of the IndexManager.

    • addIndexer

      public void addIndexer(IIndexer indexer, IInternalElementType<?> fileType)
      Adds an indexer, associated with the given file type.

      The same indexer may be added for several file types. It will then be called whenever a file of one of those file types has to be indexed.

      Conversely, several indexers may be added for the same file type. They will then all be called each time a file of the given file type has to be indexed, according to the order they were added in.

      Parameters:
      indexer - the indexer to add.
      fileType - the associated file type.

    • clearIndexers

      public void clearIndexers()
      Clears all associations between indexers and file types. Indexers will have to be added again if indexing is to be performed anew.

    • scheduleIndexing

      public void scheduleIndexing(IRodinFile... files)

    • doIndexing

      void doIndexing(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Performs the actual indexing of all files currently set to index, as soon as the indexing lock is obtained. Files are indexed project per project. If cancellation is requested on the given progress monitor, the method returns when the indexing of the current project has completed.
      Parameters:
      monitor - the monitor by which cancel requests can be performed.

    • checkCancel

      void checkCancel(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)

    • fetchPIM

      ProjectIndexManager fetchPIM(IRodinProject project)

    • start

      public void start(org.eclipse.core.resources.ISavedState savedState, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor daemonMonitor)
      Starts the indexing system. It will run until the given progress monitor is canceled.
      Parameters:
      savedState - the plugin saved state, or null if none available
      daemonMonitor - the progress monitor that handles the indexing system cancellation.

    • addListeners

      public void addListeners()
